name: Eldritch Crossbow (EOF)
hoverSummary: EOF special | -25% adrenaline | 25-tick Split Soul buff
detailLines: Stored Eldritch crossbow special attack for Essence of Finality.
Applies Split Soul for 25 ticks with no direct hit on cast.
Split Soul damage lands one tick after each qualifying hit while the buff is active.
description: Curated EOF special access entry for the Eldritch crossbow special attack.
